sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try LEFT from (39,19,39,44)
result = action(['LEFT'])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
blues = []
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'S':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        blues.append((min(rows), min(cols)))
blues = tuple(sorted(blues))
print(f"Current state: {blues}")
print("gameplay_changed:", last_action_result.get('gameplay_changed'))
print("level_completed:", last_action_result.get('level_completed'))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
